mapper.update: UPDATE saf.tn_saf_blndr SET blndr_co_info = #{blndrCoInfo}, blnd_lc_addr = #{blndLcAddr}, recv_dt = #{recvDt}, recv_mass = #{recvMass}, fuel_type_cd = #{fuelTypeCd}, blnd_ratio = #{blndRatio}, trnsprt_co_info = #{trnsprtCoInfo}, mid_buyer_co_info = #{midBuyerCoInfo}, last_chg_dt = NOW(), last_chg_user_id = #{lastChgUserId} WHERE batch_id = #{batchId}
